title: Stitched (Quilt / Fabric)
description: A large modpack stitched together carefully to satisfy the cravings of multiple different play-styles without making things over-complicated.
body:
![Main Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sleepy-evelyn/Stitched/main/banner.png)

**Update Warning (V1 > V2)**
Version 2 introduces some gamebreaking changes from version 1 so it's advised u don't update. Version 1 will still receive updates for bug fixes.

## What is Stitched?
A Modpack that aims to bring out a sense of Creativity and Exploration in completely new ways. This isn't a modpack for grinding to a rigid end goal through overly complex recipes and mechanics and is more reminiscent of older less structured modpacks.
## Q&A

- **Why should I download this pack?** - A lot of thought, design and testing has gone into it to make sure this isn't just another kitchen sink pack. Most mods have modifications made to them to better fit / blend together and there are a plethora of unique mods commonly excluded from other packs. 

- **Is this another Vanilla+ pack?** - No. This modpack doesn't exclude mods that include unique and interesting mechanics that may differ from Vanilla MC. This includes content from mods like Spectrum, Industrial Revolution, Arcanus Continuum etc...

- **Does it have Custom Recipes, Textures and Quests** - As of version 2 there are some major changes to recipes and textures from certain mods to fit better together. A lot of this is improving interaction between mods such as Create. Again in V2 quests have made an appearance but they wont be the main focus of the pack.

- **Why didn't you pick X mod instead of Y mod** - Every mod in this pack has been carefully thought through and it's very likely there is a reason it's been used instead of another similar mod.

## The big long list of features
  
#### Please feel free to check out the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/stitched/gallery) instead for pretty images :3.
-----

- **🎨 Art creation and discovery** - Create pixel art in-game and display it on canvas. Collect over 150 new collectible paintings and use 1000s of new decorative blocks for larger scale builds.

- **🎵 Music** - Enhance your Noteblock builds with Phonos. Load and play MIDI music with in-game instruments, collect and find 100s of new music discs.

- **🌎 Explore the overworld** - Travel through an array of new biomes from Natures Spirit, Regions Unexplored, Desolation and more. Delve into the unknown and discover new caves. Find the scorched remains of life and graveyards filled with the dead. Find icy castles protected by iceologers, large bustling villages and a world that is both familiar and subtly unique. Find new mobs both hostile and friendly scattered around the world from Butterflies & Bears, to Skeleton Creepers and Snakes.

- **🪐 Explore all the dimensions** - Visit everywhere from the deep dark to a world filled with bees. Enjoy an overhauled Nether and End with stunning amplified world generation. 

- **🚂 Transport** - Take a train from create, build a car from scratch, fly in an airship or a plane or even just travel on minecarts that have been given a much needed speed boost.

- **🧱 Building** - Use Templates and blocks from Architectural Extensions to build whatever shaped blocks you want, gain instant access to a ridiculously large block palette with rechiseled and make mini sculptures with bits and chisels.

- **⚔️ Combat** - Slice your opponents in style with a katana or pierce them with a spear. Build weapons and armour from basically any material combination in the game with the help of Truly Modular or just do thing the old fashioned way and blow them up with some brand new bombs from BLAST (now with claims protection included). Move in unique ways with Better Combat and FastMove parkour movement.

- **🪄 Magic** - Delve into a world of colour with Spectrum, become a wizard and bend the world to your will with Arcanus Continuum, separate from your body and fly as a spectator with spirit walker and resurrect the dead with conjuring. Create a magical factory with Botania and create spells from natural resources with Roots Classics. 

- **💻 Tech** - Use Create + addons to build insane contraptions and Botania to do just about everything else. Build modular tools and armour from just about anything with Truly Modular. Upgrade your setups with electricity and progress further with Industrial Revolution and Create Additions.

- **🔴 Redstone Additions** - Expand your creations with Computercraft and use Wired Redstone to link up your contraptions. Enjoy a bunch of additional redstone blocks from Supplementaries, Etcetera & Create.

- **💼 Storage** - Gain extra space from customisable backpacks and chests. Build a storage network that doesn't take weeks to setup with Toms Simple Storage.

- **🍔 Food & Aesthetics** - Make Wine, Cheese, Coffee Cake, Hamburgers, you name it. Build with proper tables and chairs, enjoy festive and spooky decorations, enjoy unique variants of chests, tables, ladders and more.

- **⬆️ QOL + Performance** - An insane amount of quality of life mods are included. It would be pointless listing them all here :3

- **🧸 Cute stuff!** - Plushies, Thigh Highs, Scarves, Huggable pets.

## KubeJS Data/Resource packs
Some external packs are included directly into the game using KubeJS. The remaining stuff is made in house by meeee.

### Resourcepacks
- [Tom's Create Storage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/toms-create-storage)
- [Create Immersive Aircrafts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack)
- [Industrial Revolution Textures - From Cabricality](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cabricality)
- [Created Applied Energistics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/created-applied-energistics) - Re-used for the Turtle Charger.

### Datapacks
- [Create Immersive Aircrafts Recipes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-data-pack)

## Discord
The community discord is available here: https://discord.gg/VA9YSJqmz2

## Modified Keybinds
**V1** - For Stitched versions 1.x.x only
  
**V2** - For Stitched versions 2.x.x only
